name: Skillsoft Learning & Talent API
what_it_does: Skillsoft Percipio REST API for corporate learning and talent development platform. Enables AI agents to manage learning content catalog access and search across 180,000+ courses, handle learning assignment and completion tracking for enterprise training programs, access compliance training management and certification workflows, retrieve AI-powered learning recommendations via CAISY, manage learning path and curriculum configuration, handle user enrollment and progress tracking, access learning analytics and completion reporting, retrieve certification and badge management data, manage integration with LMS platforms via SCORM and xAPI, and integrate learning data with HRIS, talent management, and LXP platforms.
use_cases: Assigning compliance training from HR compliance automation agents
Tracking employee learning completion from workforce development agents
Accessing AI learning recommendations from personalized development agents
Integrating learning data with talent management from people ops agents
not_for: Consumer education without enterprise corporate learning context
Custom LMS without pre-built content library requirements
SMB training without enterprise licensing budget
best_when: An enterprise using Skillsoft Percipio wants AI agents to automate learning assignment, compliance tracking, personalized recommendations, certification management, and talent management integration.
avoid_when: COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated compliance training assignment must respect regulatory deadlines (OSHA, harassment prevention, financial compliance) — missed assignments create legal liability. AI recommendation automation must not replace manager-driven development conversations.

auth.notes: Skillsoft Percipio uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant-level credentials with content, learner, and reporting scopes. Developer documentation at documentation.skillsoft.com. Webhooks for completion and enrollment events. SCORM and xAPI for content delivery. HRIS integrations with SAP SuccessFactors, Workday, and Oracle HCM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per seat annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual enterprise subscription; volume-based pricing per active learner
pricing.notes: Nashua, New Hampshire. Founded 1989 (formerly Books24x7). Private (KKR-backed). One of the largest corporate learning companies. 180,000+ courses and videos. CAISY AI coaching differentiator. SumTotal acquisition (2014) for LMS capabilities. 45M+ learners globally. Competes with Cornerstone and SAP SuccessFactors for enterprise learning.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API tenant; content catalog queries paginated

known_agent_gotchas: COMPLIANCE RISK: Mandatory compliance training assignment deadlines must be monitored — late assignment is legal liability
Large content catalog — 180K+ items require robust filtering and pagination for catalog queries
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API requiring enterprise tenant account
SCORM/xAPI vs REST — learning content completion uses SCORM/xAPI; REST API is for data and management only
SumTotal (LMS) vs Percipio (LXP) — Skillsoft has two distinct platforms; verify which platform is in use
Enterprise-only access — no self-serve API; requires Skillsoft commercial relationship
agent_readiness.security_notes: Corporate learning and talent data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR, WCAG. OAuth2. Multi-region. Learner progress and completion data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Corporate learning. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. Multi-region. Learner data and completion records.
